nodes.name: ObjectSerde.java
nodes.summary: Java serialization/deserialization utility for converting objects to and from byte arrays in the RisingWave Java binding.

nodes.name: UrlParser.java
nodes.summary: Utility class for parsing and extracting connection parameters from JDBC-style URL strings.

nodes.name: VnodeHelper.java
nodes.summary: Helper utilities for working with RisingWave virtual node (vnode) identifiers in the Java binding layer.

nodes.name: VnodeHelperTest.java
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the VnodeHelper utility class, verifying correct vnode computation and boundary conditions.

nodes.name: assembly.xml
nodes.summary: Maven Assembly plugin descriptor for packaging the RisingWave connector node into a distributable archive.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the RisingWave connector node assembly module, defining packaging and distribution configuration.

nodes.name: start-service.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that starts the RisingWave Java connector service with appropriate JVM options and classpath.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the connector API module defining the public interfaces for RisingWave Java connectors.

nodes.name: ColumnDesc.java
nodes.summary: Column descriptor class for the RisingWave connector API, representing metadata for table columns including name, type, and ID.

nodes.name: Monitor.java
nodes.summary: Monitoring interface for the RisingWave connector API providing metrics and health check hooks.

nodes.name: PkComparator.java
nodes.summary: Comparator implementation for primary key ordering in the RisingWave connector API, used for sorted upsert operations.

nodes.name: TrivialCloseIterable.java
nodes.summary: A simple CloseableIterable adapter that wraps an existing iterator with a no-op close method for the sink connector API.

nodes.name: CdcEngine.java
nodes.summary: Interface defining the lifecycle of a CDC engine for RisingWave's Java connector CDC sources.

nodes.name: CdcEngineRunner.java
nodes.summary: Interface for running and managing the lifecycle of CDC engine instances in the RisingWave connector.

nodes.name: SourceConfig.java
nodes.summary: Configuration interface for RisingWave CDC source connectors, providing access to connector properties.

nodes.name: sink_input.json
nodes.summary: Sample JSON payload used by the Python client integration tests to simulate sink write requests.

nodes.name: upsert_sink_input.json
nodes.summary: Sample JSON payload for upsert sink write requests used in Python client integration tests.

nodes.name: integration_tests.py
nodes.summary: Python integration test suite for the Java connector node gRPC service, exercising sink and source operations via the connector service API.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Python package init for auto-generated gRPC Protobuf bindings used in the connector node Python client.

nodes.name: pyspark-util.py
nodes.summary: PySpark utility script for testing RisingWave data integration with Apache Spark in the connector node Python client.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the RisingWave Java connector node, explaining the gRPC service architecture, supported connectors, and how to build and run.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the main RisingWave connector service module, aggregating all connector implementations.

nodes.name: DatabaseValidator.java
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for validating database connectivity and schema requirements before starting a CDC source connector.

nodes.name: MongoDbValidator.java
nodes.summary: MongoDB-specific validator that checks database connectivity, replica set configuration, and CDC prerequisites before starting the Debezium MongoDB source.

nodes.name: DbzJsonConverter.java
nodes.summary: Converts Debezium change events to the JSON format expected by RisingWave's streaming ingestion pipeline.
